name: Seasonal Festive Offer (15% Off)
subject: Exclusive Festive Offer from Glow & Grace Studio!
body:
Dear Valued Guest,

We hope this email finds you beautifully well!

To celebrate this gorgeous festive season in Kathmandu, Glow & Grace Studio is delighted to offer you an exclusive 15% discount on all our premium salon services.

Whether you want to experience our signature bespoke hair styling, an organic Korean Glass Skin facial, or a relaxing spa pedicure, now is the perfect time to book.

Use your Kathmandu studio code during your next visit: GLOWNEPAL15

Click here to reserve your luxury experience: https://glowandgrace.com/book

Warmest wishes,
The Glow & Grace Artistry Team

name: Korean Skin Glow Campaign
subject: Reveal Radiant Glass Skin: Signature Korean Facials at Durbarmarg
body:
Dear Valued Guest,

Is your skin ready for a premium transformation?

Glow & Grace Studio offers Kathmandu's most advanced, high-end Korean Glass Skin facial therapies. Our specialized beauty specialists analyze your skin type and apply botanical nutrients to restore hydration, target pores, and reveal your natural brilliant glow.

Book your signature facial therapy this week and unlock a complimentary skin wellness consultation.

Claim your 15% discount using voucher code: GLOWNEPAL15

Secure your slot here: https://glowandgrace.com/book

With grace,
The Glow & Grace Aesthetics Team

name: Special Birthday Treat
subject: Happy Birthday from Glow & Grace! A Special Gift for Your Day
body:
Dearest Guest,

Wishing you a spectacular, glowing Birthday filled with love, laughter, and endless grace!

To celebrate your special day, we would love to treat you to an absolute pampering ritual. Enjoy a complimentary luxury hair wash and scalp massage with any service booked this month, along with your 15% discount!

Voucher code: GLOWNEPAL15

Treat yourself to a birthday makeover today: https://glowandgrace.com/book

Warmest regards,
Glow & Grace Studio Kathmandu
